part.bullet1: Dual-disc applications require a left and right caliper
part.bullet2: Work with OEM-style or Performance Machine rotors
part.bullet3: Chrome calipers are highly polished then chrome-plated
part.bullet4: Include brake pads, bleeder screw and 3/8"-24 banjo bolt
part.bullet5: Made in the U.S.A.
part.bullet6: Will fit '08-'16 FLHT, FLHR, FLHR, FLHX, '08-'13 FL H-D Trike (w/ 13" rotors only) and '04-'13 XL, XLH models, but will require an 11/16" bore master cylinder for dual-disc applications and a 9/16" bore master cylinder for single-disc applications.
part.bullet7: Will not fit FXD, FXR, XL models with wire spoke wheels.

part.bullet1: Feature differential bore pistons that apply a different force at both the leading edge and the trailing edge of the pads to ensure superior braking
part.bullet2: Dual-disc applications require the separate purchase of a left and right front caliper
part.bullet3: Include brake pads, bleeder screw and 3/8"-24 banjo bolt
